items.title: Get AMD's flagship Ryzen 7 9800X3D with 32GB of DDR5 memory and an MSI B850 Wi-Fi 7 motherboard at a discount — Micro Center bundles are now available on Amazon
items.description: Micro Center is now selling some of its bundles on Amazon, including this 9800X3D combo that gives you an excellent motherboard and fast RAM without breaking the bank.
items.content: Copy link Facebook X Whatsapp Reddit Pinterest Flipboard Email Share this article 0 Join the conversation Follow us Add us as a preferred source on Google Newsletter Subscribe to our newsletter Looking to build a high-end gaming PC but stuck with soaring prices during the AI boom? Worry not as we've identified a great deal that can get you started with some excellent components. Micro Center bundles are now available on Amazon and, as such, we have a Ryzen 7 9800X3D CPU combo with an MSI B850 Gaming Plus Wi-Fi motherboard and 32GB of Klevv CRAS V memory on sale for just $1,066.26 right now. Check out this deal on Amazon further 8% offMicro Center 3-in-1 Combo: was $1,155.98 now $1,066.26 at AmazonA fantastic selection of high-end components ready to get you started on building a gaming beast. Rocking an 8-core Ryzen 7 9800X3D with 96MB of L3 cache, this bundle pairs it with a feature-rich Wi-Fi 7-capable B850 motherboard and 32GB of speedy 6,000 MT/s CL30 RAM. View Deal The Ryzen 7 9800X3D holds the first position in our best CPUs roundup for gaming. This is a world-renowned processor that doesn't need a sales pitch. It's the best choice for playing games across every resolution. Sure, it's beaten by the much more expensive 9950X3D2 sometimes (it's very rare), but that chip costs twice as much, so it's terrible value. You're getting 8x Zen 5 cores clocked up to 5.2 GHz with 96MB of L3 cache and just a 120W TDP.The motherboard this beast will be socketed inside is the MSI B850 Gaming Plus Wi-Fi with native Bluetooth 5.4 and Wi-Fi 7 support. It has a 12+2+1 phase VRM and includes three M.2 slots, with support for PCIe Gen 5.0 SSDs. The rear I/O is fantastic with plenty of speedy USB-A and USB-C ports, along with a 5 Gbps Ethernet connector. The board looks pretty clean, too, with its white and grey aesthetic complemented by blue accents. Image 1 of 4(Image credit: Tom's Hardware)(Image credit: Tom's Hardware)(Image credit: Tom's Hardware)(Image credit: Tom's Hardware) Lastly, the bundle also features a Klevv CRAS V 32GB (16x2) kit of DDR5 RAM running at 6,000 MT/s with a CL30 latency. It's the perfect kit for AM5 systems looking to strike the balance between optimal performance and stability, at least until EXPO ULL becomes commonplace. We don't need to remind you how expensive memory has gotten in the past few months, so securing it in a combo deal like this can save you a lot of money.Overall, you're looking at an excellent base of operations that only really leaves the GPU to worry about. Fortunately, we're hunting for a lot of those deals as well, so keep an eye out. Till then, don't miss out on this curated selection for just $1,066.26 on Amazon — the listing even shaves off an extra 8% off the original price. If you're looking for more savings, check out our Best PC Hardware deals for a range of products, or dive deeper into our specialized SSD and Storage Deals, Hard Drive Deals, Gaming Monitor Deals, Graphics Card Deals, gaming chair, or CPU Deals pages.
items.author: Hassam Nasir
items.titleZh: 以折扣价购买AMD旗舰锐龙7 9800X3D处理器、32GB DDR5内存和微星B850 Wi-Fi 7主板组合套装——Micro Center套装现已登陆亚马逊
items.descriptionZh:
在AI热潮导致PC组件价格飙升的背景下，Micro Center在亚马逊上推出了一款极具性价比的三合一组合套装，为想要组建高端游戏PC的用户提供了绝佳选择。该套装包含一颗Ryzen 7 9800X3D处理器、一块MSI B850 Gaming Plus Wi-Fi主板以及32GB Klevv CRAS V内存，当前售价仅为1066.26美元，比原价1155.98美元优惠了8%（约89.72美元）。这一价格在当下内存和CPU价格高企的环境中，显得尤为超值。

### 核心技术原理与创新点
套装中的Ryzen 7 9800X3D处理器是AMD的旗舰级游戏CPU，采用了创新的3D V-Cache技术，通过垂直堆叠额外的L3缓存（总计96MB），显著减少处理器访问内存时的延迟，大幅提升游戏场景下的数据命中率。其核心架构基于Zen 5，拥有8个高性能核心，最高加速频率可达5.2 GHz，而热设计功耗（TDP）仅为120W，能效比出色。与更高端的9950X3D（价格翻倍）相比，9800X3D在游戏性能上几乎持平，但价格只有后者一半，性价比极高，被誉为当前最佳游戏CPU。

### 性能参数与对比数据
- **CPU**：8核16线程，5.2 GHz加速频率，96MB L3缓存，120W TDP。在Tom's Hardware的CPU游戏性能排行榜中稳居第一，可完美应对1080p、1440p乃至4K分辨率下的所有游戏。与竞品Intel Core i9-14900K相比，虽然多线程性能稍逊，但在游戏实测中经常领先，且功耗和发热控制更优。
- **主板**：MSI B850 Gaming Plus Wi-Fi，采用12+2+1相VRM供电设计，支持原生蓝牙5.4和Wi-Fi 7（提供更低延迟和更高带宽的无线连接），配备三个M.2插槽（其中一个支持PCIe Gen 5.0固态硬盘，理论带宽可达16 GT/s），后置I/O包括多个高速USB-A/C接口以及一个5 Gbps以太网接口。外观为白色/灰色基调搭配蓝色点缀，设计简洁清爽。
- **内存**：Klevv CRAS V DDR5内存，容量32GB（16GB x 2），频率6,000 MT/s，时序CL30。对于AM5平台（如Ryzen 7000/9000系列），这一频率和时序组合是性能与稳定性的最佳平衡点，尤其是在开启EXPO（扩展配置文件，类似Intel XMP）后，可充分发挥Zen 5架构的内存带宽优势。目前DDR5内存价格持续上涨，套装中捆绑内存能有效节省成本。

### 技术影响与应用场景
该套装的核心价值在于提供了一个即插即用的高端游戏PC基础平台，用户只需额外配置一块独立显卡（GPU）即可组建一台性能强悍的“游戏猛兽”。Ryzen 7 9800X3D的3D V-Cache技术特别适合对缓存敏感的游戏（如《CS2》《绝地求生》《赛博朋克2077》等），可显著减少画面卡顿和帧率波动。搭配Wi-Fi 7主板，未来可在支持Wi-Fi 7的路由器上获得更低延迟的无线游戏体验。此外，PCIe Gen 5.0支持也为下一代显卡和高速固态硬盘留足了升级空间。

### 总结与建议
在GPU价格仍居高位的当下，以1066.26美元的价格锁定顶级CPU、功能全面的主板和高速内存的组合，堪称明智之举。用户只需再购置一块中高端显卡（如NVIDIA RTX 4070/4080系列或AMD RX 7800 XT/7900 GRE），便可轻松应对4K高画质游戏。对于追求游戏性价比、希望避开AI溢价陷阱的玩家而言，这个组合是目前亚马逊上最值得入手的硬件优惠之一。如需更多省钱方案，可关注Tom's Hardware的PC硬件、SSD、显卡等专项折扣页面。

items.title: Save $300 on this 1440p-ready gaming PC with 32GB DDR5 RAM — grab the Asus ROG GM700 with AMD's Ryzen 7 8700F and RX 9060 XT for just $1,199
items.description: Asus' ROG GM700 is a great prebuilt, packing powerful components for a solid price without compromising on the details. It just happens to look nice, too, if you're into the gamer aesthetic.
items.content: Copy link Facebook X Whatsapp Reddit Pinterest Flipboard Email Share this article 0 Join the conversation Follow us Add us as a preferred source on Google Newsletter Subscribe to our newsletter Putting together a brand-new gaming PC right now is a tough ask because of the skyrocketing prices of pretty much every piece of hardware. That's why turning to laptops and prebuilts can be a more practical choice, and we've found a great deal on a 1440p-ready system that doesn't cut corners. Asus' ROG GM700 is on sale for $1,199.99 on Newegg, pairing a Ryzen 7 8700F CPU with an RX 9060 XT GPU for solid performance across all workloads. Check out this deal on Newegg Save 20% ($300)Asus ROG GM700: was $1,499.99 now $1,199.99 at NeweggEquipped with a Ryzen 7 8700F and an RX 9060 XT 16GB, this prebuilt is ready for both work and play. Whether you want to game smoothly at 1440p or want to get productive with your PC, the GM700's 32GB of RAM has got you covered.View Deal The Ryzen 7 8700F is an 8-core, 16-thread processor from AMD's Zen 4 family. It can boost up to 5 GHz, and since it sits on the AM5 socket, you have a decent upgrade path ahead of you, too. Technically, this is a laptop chip repurposed for desktop use — a Ryzen 7 8700G without integrated graphics —, so it's slower than AMD's similar 8-core options, but it's still a perfectly capable CPU in its own right.The RX 9060 XT, on the other hand, needs no introduction. We call it "the best enthusiast value graphics card" in our top GPUs roundup. This is the full-fat 16GB model, so you're getting more VRAM than the competition at this price point. Thanks to its RDNA 4 architecture, features like FSR 4 are available right away, and the GPU performs better than the RTX 5060 Ti 8 GB, its direct MSRP rival. Image 1 of 1(Image credit: Future) Other than the main components, you're getting 32GB of DDR5 memory and a 1TB PCIe 4.0 SSD, all on a midrange B650 motherboard with Wi-Fi 6. The case looks rather nice; it has a strong front I/O, preinstalled ARGB fans, and RGB accents across the PSU shroud. Speaking of which, there's a 600W 80+ Gold power supply powering everything.Asus says the case is tool-free, so the company is already setting you up for a potential upgrade path when prices normalize a bit. Overall, the Asus ROG GM700 is a competent gaming PC that feels more like a DIY system than a prebuilt. For just $1,199 on Newegg right now, you're getting it for less than it would cost to put all these parts together yourself. If you're looking for more savings, check out our Best PC Hardware deals for a range of products, or dive deeper into our specialized SSD and Storage Deals, Hard Drive Deals, Gaming Monitor Deals, Graphics Card Deals, gaming chair, or CPU Deals pages.
items.author: Hassam Nasir
items.titleZh: 这款支持1440p游戏、配备32GB DDR5内存的电脑立减300美元——华硕ROG GM700搭载AMD锐龙7 8700F和RX 9060 XT，仅售1,199美元
items.descriptionZh:
DIY硬件价格飙升的当下，组装一台全新游戏PC变得异常困难，因此转向笔记本或整机成为更务实的选择。华硕ROG GM700游戏台式机目前在Newegg上以1,199.99美元（原价1,499.99美元，省300美元）促销，搭载Ryzen 7 8700F CPU与RX 9060 XT 16GB GPU，目标锁定1440p分辨率下的流畅游戏与高效办公。

核心配置方面，Ryzen 7 8700F是AMD Zen 4家族的8核16线程处理器，最高加速频率5GHz，基于AM5插槽，未来有不错的升级空间。值得注意的是，它本质上是笔记本芯片的桌面翻版——即去掉核显的Ryzen 7 8700G——因此性能略逊于AMD同级别的8核桌面型号，但本身仍是完全够用的CPU。RX 9060 XT 16GB则无需多言，被媒体评为“最佳发烧友价值显卡”，采用RDNA 4架构，支持FSR 4超分辨率技术，拥有16GB大显存，直接对标MSRP对手RTX 5060 Ti 8GB，性能表现更优。

其他配置包括32GB DDR5内存、1TB PCIe 4.0固态硬盘、B650中端主板（支持Wi-Fi 6）。机箱设计美观，前置I/O接口丰富，预装ARGB风扇，电源罩带有RGB灯带，配备600W 80+金牌电源。华硕声称机箱免工具拆卸，为未来硬件降价时的升级预留了便利。整体而言，ROG GM700是一台性能扎实的游戏PC，更像DIY而非传统整机。当前1,199美元的价格甚至低于自行购买所有部件组装的成本，是极具性价比的选择。

items.title: China unifies tech sector to build grid-free orbiting satellite AI data centers, challenging Elon Musk's SpaceX — Beijing's forced chip and satellite alliance announced a week before Musk’s AI1 reveal
items.description: Beijing says the Space Computing Industry Innovation Center will bring together rocket and satellite manufacturers, chip manufacturers, and AI labs to develop a space-based data center system.
items.content: Copy link Facebook X Whatsapp Reddit Pinterest Flipboard Email Share this article 2 Join the conversation Follow us Add us as a preferred source on Google Newsletter Subscribe to our newsletter The Chinese government quietly approved the Space Computing Industry Innovation Center in early June, which aims to bring together rocket and satellite manufacturers, semiconductor fabs, and AI tech companies to build a space computing network. According to the Beijing government, this aims to “connect the entire industrial chain of space computing and boost the development of the satellite Internet of Things (IoT) sector. Research firm SemiAnalysis said on X that China made this move a week before Elon Musk announced his AI1 satellite, which will run AI workloads while orbiting in space.The center is set to be officially launched later this month, and it will focus on six major research areas: highly reliable, heat-resistant space-native computing chips, high-performance hyper-interconnected space computing payloads, space computing satellite platforms and standard systems, space-based large models under constrained power conditions, integrated space-ground cloud-based measurement and control networking, and space computing power service-oriented and tokenized operations. These are designed to build an orbiting AI data center that will not rely on Earth-bound energy sources and will avoid the bottlenecks that many ground-based data center developments face today.Everyone's talking about Elon Musk's AI1 satellite this week. Almost nobody noticed: China moved on space-based AI compute a week BEFORE he did.Last week, Beijing quietly launched its first Space Computing Industry Innovation Center. Government-chartered, led by BUPT, a top… pic.twitter.com/4ATro05t2pJune 19, 2026While Beijing made this quiet announcement earlier than Musk’s AI1 reveal, we should note that Elon already had technical details available during the interview. In fact, the world’s first trillionaire has been talking about compute in space since November last year and filed for a one-million-satellite Orbital Data Center System with the FCC in February 2026. Jeff Bezos is also getting into the game with the 51,600-satellite Project Sunrise set to operate in a sun-synchronous orbit.Latest Videos FromWatch full video here: What makes China’s announcement different, though, is that it’s making multiple companies work together to build a system. On the other hand, SpaceX and Blue Origin are going at it alone — the two companies are competitors, and it doesn’t look like they’re cooperating with each other to develop the technologies required for space-based AI compute. It even seems that the former is intent on vertical integration, with its new 11-million-square-foot (around 190 to 200 football fields) Gigasat factory and Musk’s TeraFab megaproject.We’re unsure which technique will be more effective in the long run: having one or two companies pour massive resources into this megaproject (with its success or failure being solely borne by those firms) or making several smaller companies and institutions work together to build a Space Intelligent Computing Research Institute, with the output presumably available for use by Chinese firms. But one thing is certain: Beijing is taking space-based data centers seriously enough to pour resources into them — a significant move for a nation with ample excess electricity and available infrastructure to build power-hungry data centers. You may like Google is reportedly in talks with SpaceX to launch its orbital data centers SpaceX unveils 11-million-square-foot Gigasat factory, a new manufacturing facility for space-based data centers Elon Musk's first-gen orbital data center craft spans wider than a Boeing 747 and runs an interchangeable chip payload Follow Tom's Hardware on Google News, or add us as a preferred source, to get our latest news, analysis, & reviews in your feeds.Stay On the Cutting Edge: Get the Tom's Hardware NewsletterGet Tom's Hardware's best news and in-depth reviews, straight to your inbox.Contact me with news and offers from other Future brandsReceive email from us on behalf of our trusted partners or sponsors
items.author: Jowi Morales
items.titleZh: 中国整合科技行业，建设无电网轨道卫星AI数据中心，挑战马斯克的SpaceX——北京在马斯克AI1发布前一周宣布强制芯片与卫星联盟
items.descriptionZh:
中国政府在2026年6月初悄然批准成立了空间计算产业创新中心，这一举措比埃隆·马斯克宣布其AI1卫星早了整整一周。该中心由北京邮电大学牵头，联合火箭与卫星制造商、半导体代工厂以及AI技术公司，旨在整合空间计算全产业链，推动卫星物联网领域的发展。根据北京市政府的说法，该中心的目标是“连接空间计算的整个产业链，促进卫星物联网产业的发展”。研究机构SemiAnalysis指出，中国的这一动作发生在马斯克宣布其能在轨道上运行AI工作负载的AI1卫星之前。

该中心计划于2026年6月底正式启动，将聚焦六大核心技术领域：高可靠、耐高温的空间原生计算芯片；高性能、超互联的空间计算载荷；空间计算卫星平台与标准系统；在功率受限条件下的天基大模型；天地云一体化测控组网；以及空间计算算力的服务化和代币化运营。这些研究目标直指构建一个不依赖地球能源的轨道AI数据中心，从而规避当前地面数据中心发展面临的诸多瓶颈——例如电力供应紧张、土地资源稀缺、散热成本高昂等问题。

这一布局并非孤立事件。实际上，马斯克自2025年11月起就开始谈论太空计算，并于2026年2月向美国联邦通信委员会提交了百万颗卫星的轨道数据中心系统申请。杰夫·贝佐斯也通过其“日出计划”入局，计划部署51600颗太阳同步轨道卫星。然而，中国的做法与众不同：它通过政府主导的产业联盟，推动多家企业和机构协同作战。相比之下，SpaceX和蓝色起源各自为战，互不合作，且SpaceX明显倾向于垂直整合——其新建的1100万平方英尺（约相当于190至200个足球场）的Gigasat工厂以及马斯克的TeraFab大型项目，都体现了这一策略。

目前尚难判断哪种模式更有效：是由一两家公司倾注海量资源独自承担成败，还是由多家小型企业和机构联合成立空间智能计算研究院，其成果供中国公司共享？但可以肯定的是，中国在一个拥有充足过剩电力和完善基础设施的国家，仍然认真对待天基数据中心并投入资源，这一举措意义重大。从应用场景来看，空间计算网络能够为全球范围内缺乏地面基础设施的地区提供AI算力支持，特别适用于卫星物联网、实时遥感数据处理、太空中的大模型推理等任务，同时有望大幅降低数据传输延迟和地面能耗。这一中心的成立标志着中国在太空计算领域迈出了系统化、产业化的关键一步。

items.title: Intel and AMD's new ACE CPU extensions bring an efficient AI-oriented instruction set to x86 — a new design makes matrix multiplication more power- and density-efficient
items.description: ACE CPU extensions bring an efficient AI-oriented instruction set to x86 — new design makes matrix multiplication more power- and density-efficient
items.content: Copy link Facebook X Whatsapp Reddit Pinterest Flipboard Email Share this article 3 Join the conversation Follow us Add us as a preferred source on Google Newsletter Subscribe to our newsletter Most all you hear about "running an AI model" involves a GPU of some sort, but not every AI task is suited to that hardware. Smaller models or single-user latency-sensitive operations can benefit from running on the CPU instead, as it avoids the overhead of shuffling data to and from the GPU. There are also many situations where there is no GPU available to begin with, or it's a meek integrated affair with limited capabilities. Intel and AMD have recently released the full specification for the ACE CPU extensions that make it easier and more power-efficient to run the aforementioned AI tasks on x86 processors.ACE comes in by offering a technical standard that leverages the existing AVX10 registers but adds silicon dedicated to matrix multiplication. This brings multiple benefits, but the key advantages are better power efficiency, easier development and optimization, and leveraging AVX's 512-bit inputs. The latter makes for easy integration with existing designs by eschewing the need for ACE-specific inputs.Matrix multiplication is the cornerstone of AI workloads: take a table of numbers, and run a multiplication-addition loop over the whole thing. This has always been possible with most any CPU, though at limited speed. Even today, running these loops uses a lot of power, even when leveraging x86's AVX10 multiply-accumulate instructions — something that's technically a hack, as AVX wasn't designed with 2D matrix operations multiplication in mind.Latest Videos FromWatch full video here: For the same number of input vectors, ACE can perform 16x as many operations, compared to AVX10. Note this doesn't necessarily mean a 16x speedup, as that will depend on each individual implementation, but it's reasonable to expect that Intel and AMD will dedicate more silicon to this task in future designs to improve performance. Plus, as each ACE instruction performs more work than its equivalent AVX10 loop, there's less CPU instruction overhead and potentially better RAM bandwidth usage right off the bat.The benefits go far beyond just using fewer instructions for the same thing. ACE is intended to be implementation-agnostic, meaning that ML frameworks and their underlying libraries (PyTorch, TensorFlow) can just write one code path instead of having multiple variations depending on the underlying hardware and its degree of AVX support. You may like Demand for data center CPUs has surged, and AI agents are responsible Report claims Arm chips will power 90% of AI servers based on custom processors in 2029 CPU requirements for AI workloads are multiplying, driving intensifying shortages and price hikes ACE native supports most every data type used in ML operations (including but not limited to INT8, INT32, FP8, FP16, FP32, BF16), but it also can use Open Compute Project's MX block-scaled formats natively, something that AVX10 does not provide. Developers will also be able to move some NPU-specific workloads back to CPU when they need something done now and fast. In those situations, not having to deal with the fact that each NPU is different is a huge boon, too, as ACE offers a consistent target across x86 hardware. items.author: Bruno Ferreira
items.titleZh: 英特尔与AMD全新ACE CPU扩展为x86带来高效AI指令集——新设计使矩阵乘法在功耗和密度上更加高效
items.descriptionZh:
在AI计算领域，GPU往往是运行模型的首选硬件，但并非所有AI任务都适合这种架构。对于小型模型或对延迟敏感的单用户场景，CPU反而更具优势，因为它省去了数据在CPU和GPU之间来回传输的开销。此外，许多系统根本没有独立GPU，或者仅有性能有限的集成GPU。针对这些需求，Intel和AMD近期发布了ACE（Advanced Compute Extensions，高级计算扩展）CPU扩展指令集的完整规范，旨在让x86处理器以更高能效、更简便的方式运行上述AI工作负载。

ACE的核心技术原理在于，它并未引入全新的指令集架构，而是利用现有的AVX10寄存器，但增加了专门用于矩阵乘法运算的硅片单元。矩阵乘法是AI工作负载的基石：它本质上是对一个数字表格进行连续的乘加循环运算。传统的CPU虽然也能执行这一操作，但速度受限且功耗较高，即便使用x86的AVX10乘加指令（这本身是一种“取巧”用法，因为AVX并非为二维矩阵运算设计）也会浪费大量能源。ACE通过专用硬件解决了这一痛点，在相同数量的输入向量下，单条ACE指令可执行的运算次数是AVX10的16倍。这并不意味着实际加速比一定达到16倍——具体取决于各家芯片的实现方案——但可以预期Intel和AMD未来会在芯片中为ACE分配更多硅片面积以提升性能。与此同时，由于每条ACE指令完成的工作量远超等效的AVX10循环，CPU指令开销显著降低，并且能更高效地利用内存带宽。

ACE的另一大创新在于其实现无关性（implementation-agnostic）。这意味着机器学习框架及其底层库（如PyTorch、TensorFlow）只需编写一套代码路径，无需根据底层硬件的AVX支持程度维护多个变体。这极大地降低了开发和优化的复杂度。在数据类型支持方面，ACE原生支持机器学习领域绝大多数常用数据类型（包括INT8、INT32、FP8、FP16、FP32、BF16），还支持开放计算项目（OCP）的MX块缩放格式，这是AVX10所不具备的。此外，当开发者需要快速完成某些任务时，可以将原本专属于NPU（神经网络处理器）的工作负载移回到CPU上运行，而不再需要应对不同NPU之间的异构性——ACE为所有x86硬件提供了统一的目标接口，这无疑是一大福音。

ACE的发布对AI计算生态具有深远影响。首先，它让CPU在AI推理（尤其是小模型和低延迟场景）中扮演更重要的角色，填补了GPU和NPU之间的空白。其次，它降低了开发者针对x86平台进行AI优化的门槛，有望推动更多轻量级AI应用直接在用户端CPU上运行，无需依赖云端GPU。最后，随着数据中心对CPU的需求因AI代理等负载而激增（有报告指出，到2029年基于定制处理器的AI服务器中Arm芯片将占据90%份额），ACE这种标准化扩展能够帮助x86阵营维持竞争力，并缓解因AI工作负载暴涨导致的CPU供应短缺和价格飙升问题。总体上，ACE是一项兼顾性能、能效与开发便利性的技术，它将使x86平台在AI时代发挥更广泛的基石作用。

history.title: Get AMD's flagship Ryzen 7 9800X3D with 32GB of DDR5 memory and an MSI B850 Wi-Fi 7 motherboard at a discount — Micro Center bundles are now available on Amazon
history.description: Micro Center is now selling some of its bundles on Amazon, including this 9800X3D combo that gives you an excellent motherboard and fast RAM without breaking the bank.
history.content: Copy link Facebook X Whatsapp Reddit Pinterest Flipboard Email Share this article 0 Join the conversation Follow us Add us as a preferred source on Google Newsletter Subscribe to our newsletter Looking to build a high-end gaming PC but stuck with soaring prices during the AI boom? Worry not as we've identified a great deal that can get you started with some excellent components. Micro Center bundles are now available on Amazon and, as such, we have a Ryzen 7 9800X3D CPU combo with an MSI B850 Gaming Plus Wi-Fi motherboard and 32GB of Klevv CRAS V memory on sale for just $1,066.26 right now. Check out this deal on Amazon further 8% offMicro Center 3-in-1 Combo: was $1,155.98 now $1,066.26 at AmazonA fantastic selection of high-end components ready to get you started on building a gaming beast. Rocking an 8-core Ryzen 7 9800X3D with 96MB of L3 cache, this bundle pairs it with a feature-rich Wi-Fi 7-capable B850 motherboard and 32GB of speedy 6,000 MT/s CL30 RAM. View Deal The Ryzen 7 9800X3D holds the first position in our best CPUs roundup for gaming. This is a world-renowned processor that doesn't need a sales pitch. It's the best choice for playing games across every resolution. Sure, it's beaten by the much more expensive 9950X3D2 sometimes (it's very rare), but that chip costs twice as much, so it's terrible value. You're getting 8x Zen 5 cores clocked up to 5.2 GHz with 96MB of L3 cache and just a 120W TDP.The motherboard this beast will be socketed inside is the MSI B850 Gaming Plus Wi-Fi with native Bluetooth 5.4 and Wi-Fi 7 support. It has a 12+2+1 phase VRM and includes three M.2 slots, with support for PCIe Gen 5.0 SSDs. The rear I/O is fantastic with plenty of speedy USB-A and USB-C ports, along with a 5 Gbps Ethernet connector. The board looks pretty clean, too, with its white and grey aesthetic complemented by blue accents. Image 1 of 4(Image credit: Tom's Hardware)(Image credit: Tom's Hardware)(Image credit: Tom's Hardware)(Image credit: Tom's Hardware) Lastly, the bundle also features a Klevv CRAS V 32GB (16x2) kit of DDR5 RAM running at 6,000 MT/s with a CL30 latency. It's the perfect kit for AM5 systems looking to strike the balance between optimal performance and stability, at least until EXPO ULL becomes commonplace. We don't need to remind you how expensive memory has gotten in the past few months, so securing it in a combo deal like this can save you a lot of money.Overall, you're looking at an excellent base of operations that only really leaves the GPU to worry about. Fortunately, we're hunting for a lot of those deals as well, so keep an eye out. Till then, don't miss out on this curated selection for just $1,066.26 on Amazon — the listing even shaves off an extra 8% off the original price. If you're looking for more savings, check out our Best PC Hardware deals for a range of products, or dive deeper into our specialized SSD and Storage Deals, Hard Drive Deals, Gaming Monitor Deals, Graphics Card Deals, gaming chair, or CPU Deals pages.
history.author: Hassam Nasir
history.titleZh: 以折扣价购买AMD旗舰锐龙7 9800X3D处理器、32GB DDR5内存和微星B850 Wi-Fi 7主板组合套装——Micro Center套装现已登陆亚马逊
history.descriptionZh:
在AI热潮导致PC组件价格飙升的背景下，Micro Center在亚马逊上推出了一款极具性价比的三合一组合套装，为想要组建高端游戏PC的用户提供了绝佳选择。该套装包含一颗Ryzen 7 9800X3D处理器、一块MSI B850 Gaming Plus Wi-Fi主板以及32GB Klevv CRAS V内存，当前售价仅为1066.26美元，比原价1155.98美元优惠了8%（约89.72美元）。这一价格在当下内存和CPU价格高企的环境中，显得尤为超值。

### 核心技术原理与创新点
套装中的Ryzen 7 9800X3D处理器是AMD的旗舰级游戏CPU，采用了创新的3D V-Cache技术，通过垂直堆叠额外的L3缓存（总计96MB），显著减少处理器访问内存时的延迟，大幅提升游戏场景下的数据命中率。其核心架构基于Zen 5，拥有8个高性能核心，最高加速频率可达5.2 GHz，而热设计功耗（TDP）仅为120W，能效比出色。与更高端的9950X3D（价格翻倍）相比，9800X3D在游戏性能上几乎持平，但价格只有后者一半，性价比极高，被誉为当前最佳游戏CPU。

### 性能参数与对比数据
- **CPU**：8核16线程，5.2 GHz加速频率，96MB L3缓存，120W TDP。在Tom's Hardware的CPU游戏性能排行榜中稳居第一，可完美应对1080p、1440p乃至4K分辨率下的所有游戏。与竞品Intel Core i9-14900K相比，虽然多线程性能稍逊，但在游戏实测中经常领先，且功耗和发热控制更优。
- **主板**：MSI B850 Gaming Plus Wi-Fi，采用12+2+1相VRM供电设计，支持原生蓝牙5.4和Wi-Fi 7（提供更低延迟和更高带宽的无线连接），配备三个M.2插槽（其中一个支持PCIe Gen 5.0固态硬盘，理论带宽可达16 GT/s），后置I/O包括多个高速USB-A/C接口以及一个5 Gbps以太网接口。外观为白色/灰色基调搭配蓝色点缀，设计简洁清爽。
- **内存**：Klevv CRAS V DDR5内存，容量32GB（16GB x 2），频率6,000 MT/s，时序CL30。对于AM5平台（如Ryzen 7000/9000系列），这一频率和时序组合是性能与稳定性的最佳平衡点，尤其是在开启EXPO（扩展配置文件，类似Intel XMP）后，可充分发挥Zen 5架构的内存带宽优势。目前DDR5内存价格持续上涨，套装中捆绑内存能有效节省成本。

### 技术影响与应用场景
该套装的核心价值在于提供了一个即插即用的高端游戏PC基础平台，用户只需额外配置一块独立显卡（GPU）即可组建一台性能强悍的“游戏猛兽”。Ryzen 7 9800X3D的3D V-Cache技术特别适合对缓存敏感的游戏（如《CS2》《绝地求生》《赛博朋克2077》等），可显著减少画面卡顿和帧率波动。搭配Wi-Fi 7主板，未来可在支持Wi-Fi 7的路由器上获得更低延迟的无线游戏体验。此外，PCIe Gen 5.0支持也为下一代显卡和高速固态硬盘留足了升级空间。

### 总结与建议
在GPU价格仍居高位的当下，以1066.26美元的价格锁定顶级CPU、功能全面的主板和高速内存的组合，堪称明智之举。用户只需再购置一块中高端显卡（如NVIDIA RTX 4070/4080系列或AMD RX 7800 XT/7900 GRE），便可轻松应对4K高画质游戏。对于追求游戏性价比、希望避开AI溢价陷阱的玩家而言，这个组合是目前亚马逊上最值得入手的硬件优惠之一。如需更多省钱方案，可关注Tom's Hardware的PC硬件、SSD、显卡等专项折扣页面。

history.title: Save $300 on this 1440p-ready gaming PC with 32GB DDR5 RAM — grab the Asus ROG GM700 with AMD's Ryzen 7 8700F and RX 9060 XT for just $1,199
history.description: Asus' ROG GM700 is a great prebuilt, packing powerful components for a solid price without compromising on the details. It just happens to look nice, too, if you're into the gamer aesthetic.
history.content: Copy link Facebook X Whatsapp Reddit Pinterest Flipboard Email Share this article 0 Join the conversation Follow us Add us as a preferred source on Google Newsletter Subscribe to our newsletter Putting together a brand-new gaming PC right now is a tough ask because of the skyrocketing prices of pretty much every piece of hardware. That's why turning to laptops and prebuilts can be a more practical choice, and we've found a great deal on a 1440p-ready system that doesn't cut corners. Asus' ROG GM700 is on sale for $1,199.99 on Newegg, pairing a Ryzen 7 8700F CPU with an RX 9060 XT GPU for solid performance across all workloads. Check out this deal on Newegg Save 20% ($300)Asus ROG GM700: was $1,499.99 now $1,199.99 at NeweggEquipped with a Ryzen 7 8700F and an RX 9060 XT 16GB, this prebuilt is ready for both work and play. Whether you want to game smoothly at 1440p or want to get productive with your PC, the GM700's 32GB of RAM has got you covered.View Deal The Ryzen 7 8700F is an 8-core, 16-thread processor from AMD's Zen 4 family. It can boost up to 5 GHz, and since it sits on the AM5 socket, you have a decent upgrade path ahead of you, too. Technically, this is a laptop chip repurposed for desktop use — a Ryzen 7 8700G without integrated graphics —, so it's slower than AMD's similar 8-core options, but it's still a perfectly capable CPU in its own right.The RX 9060 XT, on the other hand, needs no introduction. We call it "the best enthusiast value graphics card" in our top GPUs roundup. This is the full-fat 16GB model, so you're getting more VRAM than the competition at this price point. Thanks to its RDNA 4 architecture, features like FSR 4 are available right away, and the GPU performs better than the RTX 5060 Ti 8 GB, its direct MSRP rival. Image 1 of 1(Image credit: Future) Other than the main components, you're getting 32GB of DDR5 memory and a 1TB PCIe 4.0 SSD, all on a midrange B650 motherboard with Wi-Fi 6. The case looks rather nice; it has a strong front I/O, preinstalled ARGB fans, and RGB accents across the PSU shroud. Speaking of which, there's a 600W 80+ Gold power supply powering everything.Asus says the case is tool-free, so the company is already setting you up for a potential upgrade path when prices normalize a bit. Overall, the Asus ROG GM700 is a competent gaming PC that feels more like a DIY system than a prebuilt. For just $1,199 on Newegg right now, you're getting it for less than it would cost to put all these parts together yourself. If you're looking for more savings, check out our Best PC Hardware deals for a range of products, or dive deeper into our specialized SSD and Storage Deals, Hard Drive Deals, Gaming Monitor Deals, Graphics Card Deals, gaming chair, or CPU Deals pages.
history.author: Hassam Nasir
history.titleZh: 这款支持1440p游戏、配备32GB DDR5内存的电脑立减300美元——华硕ROG GM700搭载AMD锐龙7 8700F和RX 9060 XT，仅售1,199美元
history.descriptionZh:
DIY硬件价格飙升的当下，组装一台全新游戏PC变得异常困难，因此转向笔记本或整机成为更务实的选择。华硕ROG GM700游戏台式机目前在Newegg上以1,199.99美元（原价1,499.99美元，省300美元）促销，搭载Ryzen 7 8700F CPU与RX 9060 XT 16GB GPU，目标锁定1440p分辨率下的流畅游戏与高效办公。

核心配置方面，Ryzen 7 8700F是AMD Zen 4家族的8核16线程处理器，最高加速频率5GHz，基于AM5插槽，未来有不错的升级空间。值得注意的是，它本质上是笔记本芯片的桌面翻版——即去掉核显的Ryzen 7 8700G——因此性能略逊于AMD同级别的8核桌面型号，但本身仍是完全够用的CPU。RX 9060 XT 16GB则无需多言，被媒体评为“最佳发烧友价值显卡”，采用RDNA 4架构，支持FSR 4超分辨率技术，拥有16GB大显存，直接对标MSRP对手RTX 5060 Ti 8GB，性能表现更优。

其他配置包括32GB DDR5内存、1TB PCIe 4.0固态硬盘、B650中端主板（支持Wi-Fi 6）。机箱设计美观，前置I/O接口丰富，预装ARGB风扇，电源罩带有RGB灯带，配备600W 80+金牌电源。华硕声称机箱免工具拆卸，为未来硬件降价时的升级预留了便利。整体而言，ROG GM700是一台性能扎实的游戏PC，更像DIY而非传统整机。当前1,199美元的价格甚至低于自行购买所有部件组装的成本，是极具性价比的选择。

history.title: China unifies tech sector to build grid-free orbiting satellite AI data centers, challenging Elon Musk's SpaceX — Beijing's forced chip and satellite alliance announced a week before Musk’s AI1 reveal
history.description: Beijing says the Space Computing Industry Innovation Center will bring together rocket and satellite manufacturers, chip manufacturers, and AI labs to develop a space-based data center system.
history.content: Copy link Facebook X Whatsapp Reddit Pinterest Flipboard Email Share this article 2 Join the conversation Follow us Add us as a preferred source on Google Newsletter Subscribe to our newsletter The Chinese government quietly approved the Space Computing Industry Innovation Center in early June, which aims to bring together rocket and satellite manufacturers, semiconductor fabs, and AI tech companies to build a space computing network. According to the Beijing government, this aims to “connect the entire industrial chain of space computing and boost the development of the satellite Internet of Things (IoT) sector. Research firm SemiAnalysis said on X that China made this move a week before Elon Musk announced his AI1 satellite, which will run AI workloads while orbiting in space.The center is set to be officially launched later this month, and it will focus on six major research areas: highly reliable, heat-resistant space-native computing chips, high-performance hyper-interconnected space computing payloads, space computing satellite platforms and standard systems, space-based large models under constrained power conditions, integrated space-ground cloud-based measurement and control networking, and space computing power service-oriented and tokenized operations. These are designed to build an orbiting AI data center that will not rely on Earth-bound energy sources and will avoid the bottlenecks that many ground-based data center developments face today.Everyone's talking about Elon Musk's AI1 satellite this week. Almost nobody noticed: China moved on space-based AI compute a week BEFORE he did.Last week, Beijing quietly launched its first Space Computing Industry Innovation Center. Government-chartered, led by BUPT, a top… pic.twitter.com/4ATro05t2pJune 19, 2026While Beijing made this quiet announcement earlier than Musk’s AI1 reveal, we should note that Elon already had technical details available during the interview. In fact, the world’s first trillionaire has been talking about compute in space since November last year and filed for a one-million-satellite Orbital Data Center System with the FCC in February 2026. Jeff Bezos is also getting into the game with the 51,600-satellite Project Sunrise set to operate in a sun-synchronous orbit.Latest Videos FromWatch full video here: What makes China’s announcement different, though, is that it’s making multiple companies work together to build a system. On the other hand, SpaceX and Blue Origin are going at it alone — the two companies are competitors, and it doesn’t look like they’re cooperating with each other to develop the technologies required for space-based AI compute. It even seems that the former is intent on vertical integration, with its new 11-million-square-foot (around 190 to 200 football fields) Gigasat factory and Musk’s TeraFab megaproject.We’re unsure which technique will be more effective in the long run: having one or two companies pour massive resources into this megaproject (with its success or failure being solely borne by those firms) or making several smaller companies and institutions work together to build a Space Intelligent Computing Research Institute, with the output presumably available for use by Chinese firms. But one thing is certain: Beijing is taking space-based data centers seriously enough to pour resources into them — a significant move for a nation with ample excess electricity and available infrastructure to build power-hungry data centers. You may like Google is reportedly in talks with SpaceX to launch its orbital data centers SpaceX unveils 11-million-square-foot Gigasat factory, a new manufacturing facility for space-based data centers Elon Musk's first-gen orbital data center craft spans wider than a Boeing 747 and runs an interchangeable chip payload Follow Tom's Hardware on Google News, or add us as a preferred source, to get our latest news, analysis, & reviews in your feeds.Stay On the Cutting Edge: Get the Tom's Hardware NewsletterGet Tom's Hardware's best news and in-depth reviews, straight to your inbox.Contact me with news and offers from other Future brandsReceive email from us on behalf of our trusted partners or sponsors
history.author: Jowi Morales
history.titleZh: 中国整合科技行业，建设无电网轨道卫星AI数据中心，挑战马斯克的SpaceX——北京在马斯克AI1发布前一周宣布强制芯片与卫星联盟
history.descriptionZh:
中国政府在2026年6月初悄然批准成立了空间计算产业创新中心，这一举措比埃隆·马斯克宣布其AI1卫星早了整整一周。该中心由北京邮电大学牵头，联合火箭与卫星制造商、半导体代工厂以及AI技术公司，旨在整合空间计算全产业链，推动卫星物联网领域的发展。根据北京市政府的说法，该中心的目标是“连接空间计算的整个产业链，促进卫星物联网产业的发展”。研究机构SemiAnalysis指出，中国的这一动作发生在马斯克宣布其能在轨道上运行AI工作负载的AI1卫星之前。

该中心计划于2026年6月底正式启动，将聚焦六大核心技术领域：高可靠、耐高温的空间原生计算芯片；高性能、超互联的空间计算载荷；空间计算卫星平台与标准系统；在功率受限条件下的天基大模型；天地云一体化测控组网；以及空间计算算力的服务化和代币化运营。这些研究目标直指构建一个不依赖地球能源的轨道AI数据中心，从而规避当前地面数据中心发展面临的诸多瓶颈——例如电力供应紧张、土地资源稀缺、散热成本高昂等问题。

这一布局并非孤立事件。实际上，马斯克自2025年11月起就开始谈论太空计算，并于2026年2月向美国联邦通信委员会提交了百万颗卫星的轨道数据中心系统申请。杰夫·贝佐斯也通过其“日出计划”入局，计划部署51600颗太阳同步轨道卫星。然而，中国的做法与众不同：它通过政府主导的产业联盟，推动多家企业和机构协同作战。相比之下，SpaceX和蓝色起源各自为战，互不合作，且SpaceX明显倾向于垂直整合——其新建的1100万平方英尺（约相当于190至200个足球场）的Gigasat工厂以及马斯克的TeraFab大型项目，都体现了这一策略。

目前尚难判断哪种模式更有效：是由一两家公司倾注海量资源独自承担成败，还是由多家小型企业和机构联合成立空间智能计算研究院，其成果供中国公司共享？但可以肯定的是，中国在一个拥有充足过剩电力和完善基础设施的国家，仍然认真对待天基数据中心并投入资源，这一举措意义重大。从应用场景来看，空间计算网络能够为全球范围内缺乏地面基础设施的地区提供AI算力支持，特别适用于卫星物联网、实时遥感数据处理、太空中的大模型推理等任务，同时有望大幅降低数据传输延迟和地面能耗。这一中心的成立标志着中国在太空计算领域迈出了系统化、产业化的关键一步。

history.title: Intel and AMD's new ACE CPU extensions bring an efficient AI-oriented instruction set to x86 — a new design makes matrix multiplication more power- and density-efficient
history.description: ACE CPU extensions bring an efficient AI-oriented instruction set to x86 — new design makes matrix multiplication more power- and density-efficient
history.content: Copy link Facebook X Whatsapp Reddit Pinterest Flipboard Email Share this article 3 Join the conversation Follow us Add us as a preferred source on Google Newsletter Subscribe to our newsletter Most all you hear about "running an AI model" involves a GPU of some sort, but not every AI task is suited to that hardware. Smaller models or single-user latency-sensitive operations can benefit from running on the CPU instead, as it avoids the overhead of shuffling data to and from the GPU. There are also many situations where there is no GPU available to begin with, or it's a meek integrated affair with limited capabilities. Intel and AMD have recently released the full specification for the ACE CPU extensions that make it easier and more power-efficient to run the aforementioned AI tasks on x86 processors.ACE comes in by offering a technical standard that leverages the existing AVX10 registers but adds silicon dedicated to matrix multiplication. This brings multiple benefits, but the key advantages are better power efficiency, easier development and optimization, and leveraging AVX's 512-bit inputs. The latter makes for easy integration with existing designs by eschewing the need for ACE-specific inputs.Matrix multiplication is the cornerstone of AI workloads: take a table of numbers, and run a multiplication-addition loop over the whole thing. This has always been possible with most any CPU, though at limited speed. Even today, running these loops uses a lot of power, even when leveraging x86's AVX10 multiply-accumulate instructions — something that's technically a hack, as AVX wasn't designed with 2D matrix operations multiplication in mind.Latest Videos FromWatch full video here: For the same number of input vectors, ACE can perform 16x as many operations, compared to AVX10. Note this doesn't necessarily mean a 16x speedup, as that will depend on each individual implementation, but it's reasonable to expect that Intel and AMD will dedicate more silicon to this task in future designs to improve performance. Plus, as each ACE instruction performs more work than its equivalent AVX10 loop, there's less CPU instruction overhead and potentially better RAM bandwidth usage right off the bat.The benefits go far beyond just using fewer instructions for the same thing. ACE is intended to be implementation-agnostic, meaning that ML frameworks and their underlying libraries (PyTorch, TensorFlow) can just write one code path instead of having multiple variations depending on the underlying hardware and its degree of AVX support. You may like Demand for data center CPUs has surged, and AI agents are responsible Report claims Arm chips will power 90% of AI servers based on custom processors in 2029 CPU requirements for AI workloads are multiplying, driving intensifying shortages and price hikes ACE native supports most every data type used in ML operations (including but not limited to INT8, INT32, FP8, FP16, FP32, BF16), but it also can use Open Compute Project's MX block-scaled formats natively, something that AVX10 does not provide. Developers will also be able to move some NPU-specific workloads back to CPU when they need something done now and fast. In those situations, not having to deal with the fact that each NPU is different is a huge boon, too, as ACE offers a consistent target across x86 hardware. history.author: Bruno Ferreira
history.titleZh: 英特尔与AMD全新ACE CPU扩展为x86带来高效AI指令集——新设计使矩阵乘法在功耗和密度上更加高效
history.descriptionZh:
在AI计算领域，GPU往往是运行模型的首选硬件，但并非所有AI任务都适合这种架构。对于小型模型或对延迟敏感的单用户场景，CPU反而更具优势，因为它省去了数据在CPU和GPU之间来回传输的开销。此外，许多系统根本没有独立GPU，或者仅有性能有限的集成GPU。针对这些需求，Intel和AMD近期发布了ACE（Advanced Compute Extensions，高级计算扩展）CPU扩展指令集的完整规范，旨在让x86处理器以更高能效、更简便的方式运行上述AI工作负载。

ACE的核心技术原理在于，它并未引入全新的指令集架构，而是利用现有的AVX10寄存器，但增加了专门用于矩阵乘法运算的硅片单元。矩阵乘法是AI工作负载的基石：它本质上是对一个数字表格进行连续的乘加循环运算。传统的CPU虽然也能执行这一操作，但速度受限且功耗较高，即便使用x86的AVX10乘加指令（这本身是一种“取巧”用法，因为AVX并非为二维矩阵运算设计）也会浪费大量能源。ACE通过专用硬件解决了这一痛点，在相同数量的输入向量下，单条ACE指令可执行的运算次数是AVX10的16倍。这并不意味着实际加速比一定达到16倍——具体取决于各家芯片的实现方案——但可以预期Intel和AMD未来会在芯片中为ACE分配更多硅片面积以提升性能。与此同时，由于每条ACE指令完成的工作量远超等效的AVX10循环，CPU指令开销显著降低，并且能更高效地利用内存带宽。

ACE的另一大创新在于其实现无关性（implementation-agnostic）。这意味着机器学习框架及其底层库（如PyTorch、TensorFlow）只需编写一套代码路径，无需根据底层硬件的AVX支持程度维护多个变体。这极大地降低了开发和优化的复杂度。在数据类型支持方面，ACE原生支持机器学习领域绝大多数常用数据类型（包括INT8、INT32、FP8、FP16、FP32、BF16），还支持开放计算项目（OCP）的MX块缩放格式，这是AVX10所不具备的。此外，当开发者需要快速完成某些任务时，可以将原本专属于NPU（神经网络处理器）的工作负载移回到CPU上运行，而不再需要应对不同NPU之间的异构性——ACE为所有x86硬件提供了统一的目标接口，这无疑是一大福音。

ACE的发布对AI计算生态具有深远影响。首先，它让CPU在AI推理（尤其是小模型和低延迟场景）中扮演更重要的角色，填补了GPU和NPU之间的空白。其次，它降低了开发者针对x86平台进行AI优化的门槛，有望推动更多轻量级AI应用直接在用户端CPU上运行，无需依赖云端GPU。最后，随着数据中心对CPU的需求因AI代理等负载而激增（有报告指出，到2029年基于定制处理器的AI服务器中Arm芯片将占据90%份额），ACE这种标准化扩展能够帮助x86阵营维持竞争力，并缓解因AI工作负载暴涨导致的CPU供应短缺和价格飙升问题。总体上，ACE是一项兼顾性能、能效与开发便利性的技术，它将使x86平台在AI时代发挥更广泛的基石作用。
